list.title: Schools
list.subtitle: Global view of the schools on the platform.

new.title: Add school
new.subtitle: Create a school plus its initial director. The director will receive credentials by email (placeholder in dev).
new.trialDaysHint: The school doesn't pay until it ends. It can be extended later from its detail page.

detail.pastDueHint: (trial expired / payment pending — a card needs to be added)

vendors.title: Sales agents
vendors.subtitle: Commission calculated on the monthly billing of the schools they enrolled.
vendors.newSubtitle: Pick an existing user with the sales agent role or create a new one.
vendors.invalidDuration: Invalid duration (1 to 60 months, or empty for no limit)
vendors.commissionExample: E.g., 10% for 3 months — the commission accrues over the next {months} payment periods of each enrolled school.

staff.title: Staff
staff.subtitle: Accounts for your school. The gate uses the mobile app to see arrivals and confirm deliveries; support uses the web board.

logistics.label: Gate (mobile)
logistics.help: The person at the gate. Sees arrivals, scans the parent's QR code, and confirms the delivery from the app.

support_staff.label: Support (web)
support_staff.help: Web board: sees arrivals, filters, and can finalize deliveries. No access to finances.

errors.EMAIL_ALREADY_USED: That email already has an account.
errors.INVALID_BODY: Check the details: name, email, and password (at least 8 characters).
errors.CANNOT_MODIFY_SELF: You can't deactivate your own account.
errors.CANNOT_MODIFY_ROLE: That account can't be modified from here.

staff.createFailed: The account could not be created.
staff.confirmDeactivate: Deactivate {name}? They won't be able to sign in.
staff.cannotDeactivateSelf: You can't deactivate your own account

settings.title: School settings
settings.subtitle: Identity, appearance, language, and technical details.
settings.logoTooBig: The logo exceeds 300 KB. Use a lighter image.
settings.identityDesc: School name, location, and access code.
settings.accessCodeHint: Share it with your directors and parents — they type it on the login screen to reach your school's personalized version.
settings.appearanceDesc: How the panel looks: logo, brand color, and density.
settings.logoHint: PNG, SVG, JPG, or WebP with a transparent background. Max 300 KB.
settings.accentColorHint: Icons and card bands. If none is chosen, the primary color is used.
settings.densityApplyHint: Applied when you save and reload the panel.
settings.languageRegionDesc: Spanish variant used in the panel texts.

setup.title: Set up your school
setup.subtitle: You only do this once. You can edit everything from the panel later.
setup.internalCodeHint: 4 to 12 characters, uppercase letters or numbers. You use it when a parent tells you "I'm signing up".
setup.saveSchoolFailed: The school could not be saved
setup.createPickupFailed: The pickup point could not be created

onboarding.title: Set up your school
onboarding.subtitle: Complete these steps to get the school ready to operate. You can come back anytime.
onboarding.readyDesc: You have pickup points, grades, students, and invited parents. You can now run pickups.
onboarding.almostDesc: The school is ready with at least one pickup point, one grade, one student, and one invited parent.
onboarding.parentsProgress: {invited, plural, one {# invited} other {# invited}} · {registered, plural, one {# registered} other {# registered}} in the app.

combined.title: Upload the whole school in a single file
combined.description: Students and parents together: one row per student with their parent's details. Invitations stay pending and you send them when the school is ready.

pickup.title: Pickup point
pickup.description: Mark the school's gate and its radius (geofence) on the map.

grades.title: Grades
grades.description: Set up the school's grades ("1st Grade A", "Kindergarten") before adding students. Each student is assigned to an existing grade.

students.title: Students
students.description: Upload the Excel with all students (or add them one by one from the list), with their grades.

parents.title: Invited parents
parents.description: Upload the parents' Excel file: invitations stay pending and you send them from Invitations (selected, by grade, or all), with reminders for those who don't register.

staff.title: Gate staff
staff.description: Add assistants (logistics) and support staff who run the TV and finalize deliveries.

super.title: Super admin · Global dashboard
super.subtitle: Aggregated metrics across the whole platform.
super.note1: · Estimated MRR = active students × price per student, summed across schools with an active subscription.
super.note2: · Mobile users = parents with a registered push device, per platform. Pusher/Expo costs scale with this number.
super.note3: · Countries/cities come from the school's profile (editable in its detail page).
super.note4: · Stats query live rows — no cache. At scale this gets denormalized.
